title: Aptech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Aptech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
